title: Modernizing Data Ingestion and Reducing Integration Costs
excerpt: A growth-stage commerce platform relied on managed data ingestion tooling that became increasingly expensive and restrictive as data volume grew. Customization and control over pipelines were limited.

seo.title: Modernizing Data Ingestion and Reducing Integration Costs
seo.description: A growth-stage commerce platform relied on managed data ingestion tooling that became increasingly expensive and restrictive as data volume grew. Customization and control over pipelines were limited.

challenge: A growth-stage commerce platform relied on managed data ingestion tooling that became increasingly expensive and restrictive as data volume grew. Customization and control over pipelines were limited.
whatWeDid: Migrated ingestion workflows to a self-hosted, open-source platform. Rebuilt pipelines for web analytics and transactional data, recreated transformation logic, and validated all downstream models to ensure parity.
outcome: Lower integration costs, greater control over data pipelines, and a more flexible foundation that supports future data sources without downtime.
